name: masked guys
description:
You got stuck in an elevator with three masked men when you were trying to carry your groceries back to your apartment. 

was a personal bot but i will share it with the masked men lovers
UPDATE: the bot kept giving them names (something I didn't add) so I took the names it gave them most often and used them, so they now have official names! It's still labeled who is who next to their names in the first message, but eventually I'll remove it so it's only their names
pfp by @JISPOOKS on X (twitter)
creator: goofygoobergirl
